name: deep-research
description: Multi-source research engine with tiered model pinning (sonnet/haiku agents for research, parent model for synthesis), deep-fetch, content refinement, and flexible output: terminal, file, or skillwiki vault integration with schema-compatible follow-up queueing. v2.4.0: Codex CLI/App compatibility — references/codex-tools.md maps the Agent tool to spawn_agent/wait_agent/close_agent, documents the multi_agent config gate, the sonnet/haiku model-tier fallback, and detached-HEAD sandbox handling for vault writes.
